description: Project Manager naming roster. Allocated round-robin from this pool when the dispatcher creates a Mode-3 project; freed when the project completes; reusable for future projects. Curated for gender balance (50 F / 50 M) and to reflect multicultural Australia — names drawn from Anglo-Australian, Chinese, Indian, Lebanese/Arabic, Vietnamese, Greek, Italian, Turkish, Filipino, Korean, Iranian, and Pacific-Islander Australian communities. **Globally unique across EAs — Alex (Jeff's partition) and Quinn (Sarah's partition) draw from the same pool, so two concurrent projects can never carry the same PM name regardless of owning EA.** Operator may extend or reorder; allocation order is the array order. Names in use at allocation time are skipped automatically — see src/pmNameRoster.ts.
notes: Adding a name: append to the roster array. Removing a name: do not remove if a project is in flight using it; remove only when no active project carries the name.
Renaming: do not rename. Allocate a fresh name to the next project instead so audit history stays intact.
Cultural note: this curation aims for breadth, not census-accurate weighting. The list is a working pool, not a demographic snapshot. Operator extends as the dispatcher gets used.
